fields.name: metadata.source_department
fields.description: The department that originated this data, in this case 'Investments'

fields.name: metadata.target_department
fields.description: The department that is the target of this data, in this case 'Marketing'

fields.name: metadata.product_name
fields.description: The name of the investment product being considered for these customers

fields.name: metadata.generated_date
fields.description: The date and time this data was generated

fields.name: metadata.eligibility_criteria
fields.description: The criteria used to determine which customers are eligible for this product

fields.name: eligible_customers
fields.description: An array of customer objects, each representing a customer eligible for this product

children.name: customer_id
children.description: A unique identifier for the customer

children.name: email
children.description: The email address of the customer

children.name: account_balance
children.description: The current balance in the customer's account

children.name: customer_tenure_months
children.description: The number of months the customer has been with the bank

children.name: investment_experience_level
children.description: The level of investment experience the customer has

children.name: risk_profile
children.description: The risk profile of the customer, indicating their willingness to take on risk

children.name: last_investment_activity
children.description: The date and time of the customer's last investment activity

children.name: recommended_product_allocation
children.description: The recommended product allocation for the customer, based on their risk profile and investment experience

fields.name: summary
fields.description: A summary of the eligible customers and their characteristics

children.name: total_eligible_customers
children.description: The total number of eligible customers

children.name: total_eligible_assets
children.description: The total value of the eligible assets

children.name: average_account_balance
children.description: The average account balance of the eligible customers

children.name: campaign_priority
children.description: The priority level for this campaign, indicating its importance and urgency
